description: Build a seed corpus whose training examples require the model to emit fixed loss without injected decoder anchors.
Add examples and diagnostics that specifically test generation of the first token fixed from an empty answer prefix.
Add examples and diagnostics that test generation of the second token loss after fixed is generated by the model, not provided by an anchor.
Train a short repair checkpoint from the unassisted seed and keep quality claims gated behind replay.
Replay the unchanged objective contract and the bounded route holdout before any promotion decision.
